entries.name: Code Reviewer
entries.description: A focused reviewer that reads a diff and flags correctness bugs and clarity issues.
entries.longDescription: Drop-in subagent for Claude Code (and compatible tools). It reviews the current diff for real bugs first, then suggests reuse and simplification cleanups, and reports findings with file:line references. Vendored in this repo so you can read exactly what gets installed.
entries.author: Zurek

entries.name: Context7
entries.description: Up-to-date code docs and examples for any library, pulled straight into context.
entries.longDescription: Context7 fetches current, version-specific documentation and code examples for thousands of libraries so your agent stops hallucinating outdated APIs. Runs locally via npx; no account required for basic use.
entries.author: Upstash

env.description: Optional API key for higher rate limits (get one at context7.com).

entries.name: Essentials Pack
entries.description: A starter set: the Context7 docs server plus a code-review agent.
entries.longDescription: Installs everything you need to get going: Context7 for up-to-date library docs, and the Code Reviewer agent for a quick second pair of eyes on your diffs. Each item can also be installed on its own.
entries.author: Zurek

entries.name: Monorepo Management
entries.description: Patterns and workflows for working effectively inside a monorepo.
entries.longDescription: Guidance for navigating and changing code in a monorepo: workspace layout, scoped builds and tests, dependency boundaries, and release coordination. Downloaded from the upstream wshobson/agents repository at install time.
entries.author: wshobson
